title: salix propendens
intro: Salix propendens, also known as Dandylion Willow, is a species of willow tree native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its slender branches and white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, derived from its salicylic acid content, which is similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix propendens include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Salix propendens include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by steeping the bark or leaves in hot water or oil.
